newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. FY2027 guidance (net sales +3.5-4.5% cc, adj EPS $2.75-2.85) and the prior quarter were already digested; next earnings is August 20, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: Carbon-consumption basket lens: WMT remains a mature, consensus, already-institutionally-owned household-spend proxy. Nothing new since June 9 (guidance/Q1 digested, next print Aug 20), so the low-alpha defensive role is unchanged.
verdicts.bull: Durable grocery/pharmacy traffic, defensive FY27 guide, AI/automation cost lever.
verdicts.neutral: Solid compounder but consensus-owned with little residual alpha vs the basket.
verdicts.bear: Mega-cap, fully owned; minimal asymmetry and no carbon-vs-silicon catalyst.
